message:
Prevent accidental commits of generated changelog files

- Use dynamic import in topics.ts with fallback for missing data
- Output sync script to sidebar-changelog.generated.ts (gitignored)
- Remove tracked sidebar-changelog.ts stub file
- Add project icons to generated landing page
- Gitignore entire changelog content directory (including index.mdx)

This allows `pnpm dev` to work without running sync first, while
ensuring generated files don't accidentally get committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@
----
-title: Changelog
----
-
-{/* Auto-generated by scripts/sync-changelog.mjs - do not edit manually. */}
-{/* This placeholder exists so builds succeed before sync runs. */}
-
-Run `pnpm sync:changelog` to populate changelog content.
